data.text: A FELISIAN WORLD, MANY BODIES OF WATER, A SLIGHTLY GREY CAST. AT 253.60
IT WAS ROLLING GROUND WITH SHRUBS WITH PURPLE AND GREEN FOILAGE, BIRDS
AND A HOPPER WERE SIGHTED. AT 35.91 THERE WAS A SMALL ISLAND WITH
YELLOW SHRUBS. AT 68.008 I WAS GREETED BY MANY HOPPERS AND BIRDS, IN MY
DESCENT I NOTED TRIANGULAR SHAPED ICE FLOWS, WHICH TURNED OUT TO BE
ON THE EDGE OF A GREAT CHASM AT ABOUT 3.0. SKINNYMON EPOC 6011
FURTHER NOTES:AT ONE OF THE LOCATIONS SPECIFIED ABOVE, I WAS AMBUSHED
BY A LARGE, STONE-COLOURED HOPPER. I'M GETTING OUT OF HERE! RYAN GJK
